rationale: Vivid, well-organized profile with strong scene-setting and many concrete details that make Jim memorable and the school feel real. It reads smoothly and stays focused on the central claim that he knows students by name. The only weakness is simplicity: some lines are a bit lyrical or embellished for plain nonfiction ('building exhale,' 'institutional memory made flesh'), which makes the style less direct than it could be.
